title: OAP Action
description: Normative schema for a single Action exposed by an OAP Tool.

cost.description: Per Action pricing. The 'type' enum accepts both the legacy v1.0 identifiers and the RFC 0013 commerce model identifiers (per_invocation, per_outcome, per_token_knowledge, per_capability, per_delegation).

unit.description: Unit of metering. Required for per_token_knowledge.

quote_endpoint.description: Endpoint that returns a signed Quote for a proposed invocation. Required for per_invocation per RFC 0013 § 3.3.

procurement_endpoint.description: Endpoint that accepts Procurement Intents and returns Offers. Required for per_outcome per RFC 0013 § 3.4.

delegation_endpoint.description: Endpoint that accepts Task Orders. Required for per_delegation per RFC 0013 § 3.8.

budget_window_days.description: Budget window length for per_capability per RFC 0013 § 3.6.

renewal_behavior.description: Behavior at window close for per_capability.

stake_required.description: Stake amount for per_delegation per RFC 0013 § 3.8.

primitive.description: Optional Commerce Primitive per RFC 0014. When present it overrides 'type' for this action and supplies a full five axis description.

cost_disclosure.description: Build versus Buy Decision Protocol disclosure per RFC 0013 § 3.7. REQUIRED at conformance level C2 or higher.

token_equivalent.description: Output volume of one invocation expressed as tokens of a reference inference model.

reference_model.description: Identifier of the reference model used for the token_equivalent estimate.

quality_evidence.description: URI to a signed benchmark, attestation, or audit supporting the quality_claim.
